infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is required to stream audio from your Meta Ray-Bans to Enki AI.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Bluetooth access is required to route audio through your Meta Ray-Bans.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Bluetooth access is required to route audio through your Meta Ray-Bans.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Enki Companion to access your microphone for Ray-Ban audio streaming.
